title: Ports, Protocols, Services, and Traffic Types · Packet Lens: Net Icmp Tcp Udp Gre
summary: Build and diagnose a service-access matrix from client, firewall, resolver, server, and capture evidence. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net icmp tcp udp gre increment in a verified protocol and service matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare ICMP, TCP, UDP, and GRE purpose, headers, state, errors, and troubleshooting evidence.
Explain how DNS, DHCP, NTP, PTP, and NTS dependencies affect authentication, addressing, logging, and service reachability.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
